instruction: Help me record the sales channel performance

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Channel'
ws['B1'] = 'Visits'
ws['C1'] = 'Conversion Rate(%)'
ws['D1'] = 'Sales(10K CNY)'
ws['A2'] = 'Website'
ws['B2'] = 12500
ws['C2'] = 2.8
ws['D2'] = 35.0
ws['A3'] = 'Mini Program'
ws['B3'] = 8800
ws['C3'] = 5.2
ws['D3'] = 45.8
ws['A4'] = 'APP'
ws['B4'] = 6200
ws['C4'] = 6.1
ws['D4'] = 37.8
ws['A5'] = 'Third-party Platform'
ws['B5'] = 25000
ws['C5'] = 1.9
ws['D5'] = 47.5
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/sales_channels.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me record the sales channel performance
Find the channel with the highest conversion rate from /home/user/Desktop/sales_channels.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/channel_report.txt: 'Highest Conversion Rate Channel: APP (6.1%)', save
